overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a forest path at night. The scene features a dark, moody atmosphere with overcast skies, dense pine trees, and mountainous terrain in the background. The character encounters a villager NPC before continuing deeper into the woods.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain forest trail with cliff views

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the winding dirt path through the forested mountainside

entered.detail: rocky mountain cliff face visible through the trees on the left side
tall evergreen pine trees lining the right side of the trail
winding dirt trail with patches of grass and small rocks
mountain peaks visible in the background through the forest canopy

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a third-person view following a white-haired character walking along a dirt trail through a mountainous forest at night. Rocky cliffs are visible to the left while pine trees line the right side of the path. The atmosphere is dark and moody with overcast skies, and the character moves steadily forward along the winding trail.

events.description: villager NPC comes into view standing on the path ahead
passes the villager and continues forward along the trail

agents.ego_description: approaching a villager standing on the path and walking past them

notable_agents.action: villager in blue tunic and brown pants standing on the trail, facing the camera direction before being passed

entered.detail: small open clearing in the forest where the path widens slightly

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a small forest clearing where a villager NPC stands in the middle of the path. The villager wears a blue tunic and brown pants and remains stationary as the character walks past them. The mountain cliff remains visible on the left but appears closer, and the path continues into the denser forest ahead.

events.description: path enters denser forest section with thicker tree coverage and darker atmosphere

agents.ego_description: continuing along the trail into darker, denser woodland with taller trees

entered.detail: thick wall of pine trees on the left side of the path
thick wall of pine trees on the right side of the path
tree branches extending over the trail creating a canopy effect

segments.scene_description: The trail enters a denser section of forest where tall pine trees crowd both sides of the path and overhanging branches partially obscure the sky. The mountain cliff and clearing from earlier segments are no longer visible as the character moves deeper into the woodland. The lighting becomes slightly darker under the tree canopy as the character continues walking forward.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a mountainous forest at night that gradually transitions from an open trail into a dense, shadowed woodland. It begins by following a white-haired character walking along a winding dirt path, flanked by rocky cliffs on the left and pine trees on the right under a moody, overcast sky. As the character moves forward, the scene opens into a small clearing where they pass a stationary villager dressed in a blue tunic and brown pants. The path then leads away from the cliffside and into a thicker section of the forest, where tall pine trees and overhanging branches begin to crowd the trail. Finally, the lighting dims further under the heavy tree canopy as the character disappears deeper into the dark woodland.
